documentation_impact.rationale: The change introduces a commit-time enforcement mechanism and a new canonical handbook contract that alters operator and agent workflow expectations.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: The change enforces mandatory documentation-impact and governance checks before governed commits can proceed.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: The change improves reference integrity and traceable governance decisions during bootstrap by requiring a machine-checkable policy artifact.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: The change strengthens reliable, auditable operator controls for autonomous repository updates.
